NAVAREA XIX 147/25
 NORWEGIAN SEA , BARENTS SEA
 1. LAUNCH OF TWO SCIENTIFIC RESEARCH ROCKETS FROM ANDOEYA.
 WILL TAKE PLACE. BETWEEN 0600 AND 1100 UTC, WITHIN THE PERIOD 13 TO 27 NOV 25.

 2. NORWEGIAN NOTICES TO MARINERS 20/ 2025 REFERS
